metadata.name: Intimidate — artifact creature successfully blocks (positive case)
metadata.description: p1 controls Bladetusk Boar (3/2, red, Intimidate). p2 controls Memnite (1/1, colorless Artifact Creature). Bladetusk Boar attacks; Memnite legally blocks despite intimidate because CR 702.13b explicitly permits artifact creatures to block creatures with intimidate regardless of color. Combat damage resolves: Boar deals 3 damage to Memnite (lethal), Memnite deals 1 damage to Boar (non-lethal, toughness 2). Memnite is destroyed by SBA (CR 704.5g). Bladetusk Boar survives with 1 damage marked. Tests the artifact-creature exception to the intimidate blocking restriction. Note: combat steps are documentary (turn_based_action) — the harness does not execute combat; zone-change assertions are documented in sba_check notes.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.13b: A creature with intimidate can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or creatures that share a color with it. Memnite is a colorless artifact creature (Artifact Creature — Construct, {0}, 1/1, no color identity) and therefore falls into the explicit artifact-creature exception. The block is legal under CR 509.1b (no restriction violated). Combat damage: CR 510.1c — Boar (3 power) assigns all 3 damage to Memnite (its sole blocker); CR 510.1d — Memnite (1 power) assigns all 1 damage to Boar. Boar has toughness 2, so 1 damage is non-lethal. Memnite has toughness 1, so 3 damage is lethal. CR 704.5g: Memnite has damage >= toughness and is destroyed. Boar remains on battlefield with 1 damage marked (cleared at end of turn per CR 510.5). Bladetusk Boar card definition: {3}{R}, Creature — Boar, 3/2, red, keyword Intimidate. Memnite card definition: {0}, Artifact Creature — Construct, 1/1, colorless, no abilities. Harness validation: final assert scoped to life totals only (verifiable state) — combat turn_based_action steps are documentary; zone changes from combat damage are not executed by the harness (consistent with scripts 004-008). Dispute filed at step 0 action 4 (sba_check) noting that Memnite destruction cannot be harness-asserted.

disputes.description: Harness does not execute combat from turn_based_action or sba_check steps — zone changes from combat damage (Memnite destroyed, moved to graveyard) cannot be asserted after the script runs. The CR reasoning is correct: Memnite is a legal blocker (702.13b artifact exception), 3 damage is lethal to a 1-toughness creature (704.5g), and Boar survives with 1 non-lethal damage. This is consistent with the approach taken in scripts 004, 005, 007, and 008 which also use documentary turn_based_action steps without zone-change assertions. Full executable combat coverage requires engine-level combat command support in the harness.

script.step_note: Bladetusk Boar (3/2, Intimidate) attacks p2; Memnite (1/1 Artifact Creature) blocks legally as an artifact creature.

actions.description: Initial: Bladetusk Boar (3/2 Intimidate) on p1 battlefield; Memnite (1/1 artifact) on p2 battlefield; life totals 40/40
Declare attackers: p1 attacks with Bladetusk Boar targeting p2
actions.note: CR 508.1: p1 declares Bladetusk Boar as attacker. Boar becomes tapped (CR 508.1f). Boar has Intimidate (CR 702.13b).

actions.description: Declare blockers: p2 blocks Bladetusk Boar with Memnite — legal because Memnite is an artifact creature
actions.note: CR 509.1b: Blocker restriction check. CR 702.13b: Intimidate says 'can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or creatures that share a color with it.' Memnite is a colorless artifact creature, satisfying the artifact-creature exception. Block is legal.

actions.description: Combat damage assignment: Boar assigns 3 damage to Memnite; Memnite assigns 1 damage to Boar
actions.note: CR 510.1c: Bladetusk Boar (3 power) assigns all 3 damage to Memnite, its sole blocker. CR 510.1d: Memnite (1 power) assigns all 1 damage to Bladetusk Boar. Boar toughness is 2, so 1 damage is non-lethal. Memnite toughness is 1, so 3 damage is lethal.
CR 704.5g: Memnite has toughness 1 and 3 damage marked (>= toughness). Lethal damage — Memnite is destroyed and goes to p2's graveyard.

CR 704.5g: SBAs checked after combat damage. Bladetusk Boar has 1 damage marked on a 2-toughness creature — non-lethal, survives. Expected outcome (not harness-executable): Memnite in p2 graveyard, Boar on p1 battlefield.

actions.description: Post-combat state as visible to harness: life totals unchanged (Boar was blocked, no unblocked damage to players)
actions.note: Life totals remain 40/40: Bladetusk Boar was fully blocked by Memnite (no trample), so no damage reached p2. Memnite's 1 damage went to Boar (non-lethal, toughness 2). Zone changes from combat damage (Memnite destroyed) are documented in sba_check above but not executable by the harness.
